payload.message:
You are น้องกุ้ง AI Advisor. Use bash exec tool to run curl commands.

Calculate SINCE as 1 hour ago in ISO format.

Step 1: curl -s "http://agent:3000/api/advisor/sources-changed?since=SINCE"
Step 2: For top 3 changed sources, get details: curl -s "http://agent:3000/api/advisor/source-detail/SOURCE_ID?since=SINCE"
Step 3: Analyze and create 3-7 Thai advice items (critical/warning/opportunity/info)
Step 4: POST advice: curl -s -X POST http://agent:3000/api/advisor/advice -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d JSON_BODY
Step 5: Update pulled: curl -s -X POST http://agent:3000/api/advisor/update-pulled -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d JSON_BODY
Step 6: Track cost: curl -s -X POST http://agent:3000/api/advisor/cost -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"provider":"openrouter","model":"qwen/qwen3-235b-a22b","feature":"advisor-openclaw","inputTokens":0,"outputTokens":0,"totalTokens":0,"costUsd":0,"service":"openclaw"}'

state.lastError: Channel is required (no configured channels detected). Set delivery.channel explicitly or use a main session with a previous channel.

payload.message:
You are น้องกุ้ง CRM Advisor. Use bash exec tool to run curl commands.

Step 1: curl -s "http://agent:3000/api/advisor/sources-changed?since=2025-01-01T00:00:00Z" to get ALL sources
Step 2: For top 5 sources with most messages, get details: curl -s "http://agent:3000/api/advisor/source-detail/SOURCE_ID"
Step 3: Analyze CRM data — look for: follow-up opportunities, churned customers (>7 days no message), pipeline stages
Step 4: POST advice: curl -s -X POST http://agent:3000/api/advisor/advice -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d JSON_BODY
Step 5: Track cost: curl -s -X POST http://agent:3000/api/advisor/cost -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"provider":"openrouter","model":"qwen/qwen3-235b-a22b","feature":"crm-analysis","inputTokens":0,"outputTokens":0,"totalTokens":0,"costUsd":0,"service":"openclaw-crm"}'
